noArticles.title: Blog has no articles yet
noArticles.description: Statistics will be available after adding the first article

topArticle.title: Most Read Article
topArticle.noViews: No article has been read yet

topLikedArticle.title: Most Liked Article
topLikedArticle.noLikes: No article has been liked yet

engagementRate.title: Engagement Rate
engagementRate.tooltip: Engagement rate shows how actively readers interact with your articles. It is calculated as the average ratio of interactions (likes, comments, shares, and poll votes) to views for each article. A higher value indicates greater reader engagement.

upgradePrompt.title: Unlock Premium Statistics
upgradePrompt.description: Gain deeper insights into your blog's performance with advanced charts, share analysis, engagement rate, and popular tags. Upgrade to PRO or PREMIUM to maximize your potential!
